sqlMap.sql: (f.iv = 100 AND f.lvl <> 35 + f.alph) OR (f.iv IN (98, 96) AND f.lvl <> 35) OR (f.iv IN (93, 91) AND f.lvl <> 30) OR (f.iv IN (89, 87) AND f.lvl <> 25) OR (f.iv IN (84, 82) AND f.lvl <> 20)
sqlMap.select: WITH bas_list AS ( SELECT DISTINCT base_no AS base_no FROM pokedex WHERE no IN ( SELECT no FROM pogo5f UNION ALL SELECT no FROM pogo5s UNION ALL SELECT no FROM pogo5t ) ), poke_agg AS ( SELECT d.base_no AS base_no , SUM(CASE d.gndr_rt WHEN '10' THEN 2 * d.no_form WHEN '01' THEN 0 WHEN '00' THEN 0 ELSE d.no_form END) AS mal_max , SUM(CASE d.gndr_rt WHEN '01' THEN 2 * d.no_form WHEN '10' THEN 0 WHEN '00' THEN 0 ELSE d.no_form END) AS fem_max , SUM(CASE d.gndr_rt WHEN '00' THEN 2 * d.no_form ELSE 0 END) AS gen_max FROM pokedex d JOIN bas_list b ON d.base_no = b.base_no GROUP BY d.base_no ), pogo_total AS ( SELECT SUM(mal_max + fem_max + gen_max) AS total FROM poke_agg ), f_pow AS ( SELECT d.base_no AS base_no , GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(f.gndr, f.lvl) ORDER BY f.gndr DESC, f.lvl DESC SEPARATOR ',') AS pow FROM pogo5f f JOIN pokedex d ON d.no = f.no WHERE GROUP BY d.base_no ), f_cnt AS ( SELECT d.base_no AS base_no , SUM(CASE WHEN f.gndr = 'm' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS mal_sum , SUM(CASE WHEN f.gndr = 'f' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fem_sum , SUM(CASE WHEN f.gndr = 'g' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS gen_sum FROM pogo5f f JOIN pokedex d ON d.no = f.no GROUP BY d.base_no ), s_pow AS ( SELECT d.base_no AS base_no , GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(f.gndr, f.lvl) ORDER BY f.gndr DESC, f.lvl DESC SEPARATOR ',') AS pow FROM pogo5s f JOIN pokedex d ON d.no = f.no WHERE GROUP BY d.base_no ), s_cnt AS ( SELECT d.base_no AS base_no , SUM(CASE WHEN f.gndr = 'm' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS mal_sum , SUM(CASE WHEN f.gndr = 'f' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fem_sum , SUM(CASE WHEN f.gndr = 'g' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS gen_sum FROM pogo5s f JOIN pokedex d ON d.no = f.no GROUP BY d.base_no ), t_pow AS ( SELECT d.base_no AS base_no , GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(f.gndr, f.lvl) ORDER BY f.gndr DESC, f.lvl DESC SEPARATOR ',') AS pow FROM pogo5t f JOIN pokedex d ON d.no = f.no WHERE GROUP BY d.base_no ), t_cnt AS ( SELECT d.base_no AS base_no , SUM(CASE WHEN f.gndr = 'm' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS mal_sum , SUM(CASE WHEN f.gndr = 'f' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fem_sum , SUM(CASE WHEN f.gndr = 'g' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS gen_sum FROM pogo5t f JOIN pokedex d ON d.no = f.no GROUP BY d.base_no ) SELECT pa.base_no "basId" , pk.dv "div" , pk.name "name" , REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(CONCAT(IFNULL(fp.pow, ''), ',,,,,,,,,,'), ',', 10), ',', CHAR(9)) "pogo5fPow" , REPLACE( CONCAT(CASE WHEN pa.mal_max <> IFNULL(fc.mal_sum, 0) THEN CAST(pa.mal_max - IFNULL(fc.mal_sum, 0) AS CHAR) ELSE '' END, ',', CASE WHEN pa.fem_max <> IFNULL(fc.fem_sum, 0) THEN CAST(pa.fem_max - IFNULL(fc.fem_sum, 0) AS CHAR) ELSE '' END, ',', CASE WHEN pa.gen_max <> IFNULL(fc.gen_sum, 0) THEN CAST(pa.gen_max - IFNULL(fc.gen_sum, 0) AS CHAR) ELSE '' END) , ',', CHAR(9)) "pogo5fCat" , REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(CONCAT(IFNULL(sp.pow, ''), ',,,,,,,,,,'), ',', 10), ',', CHAR(9)) "pogo5sPow" , REPLACE( CONCAT(CASE WHEN pa.mal_max <> IFNULL(sc.mal_sum, 0) THEN CAST(pa.mal_max - IFNULL(sc.mal_sum, 0) AS CHAR) ELSE '' END, ',', CASE WHEN pa.fem_max <> IFNULL(sc.fem_sum, 0) THEN CAST(pa.fem_max - IFNULL(sc.fem_sum, 0) AS CHAR) ELSE '' END, ',', CASE WHEN pa.gen_max <> IFNULL(sc.gen_sum, 0) THEN CAST(pa.gen_max - IFNULL(sc.gen_sum, 0) AS CHAR) ELSE '' END) , ',', CHAR(9)) "pogo5sCat" , REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(CONCAT(IFNULL(tp.pow, ''), ',,,,,,,,,,'), ',', 10), ',', CHAR(9)) "pogo5tPow" , REPLACE( CONCAT(CASE WHEN pa.mal_max <> IFNULL(tc.mal_sum, 0) THEN CAST(pa.mal_max - IFNULL(tc.mal_sum, 0) AS CHAR) ELSE '' END, ',', CASE WHEN pa.fem_max <> IFNULL(tc.fem_sum, 0) THEN CAST(pa.fem_max - IFNULL(tc.fem_sum, 0) AS CHAR) ELSE '' END, ',', CASE WHEN pa.gen_max <> IFNULL(tc.gen_sum, 0) THEN CAST(pa.gen_max - IFNULL(tc.gen_sum, 0) AS CHAR) ELSE '' END) , ',', CHAR(9)) "pogo5tCat" , REPLACE( CONCAT(CASE WHEN pa.mal_max <> 0 THEN CAST(pa.mal_max AS CHAR) ELSE '' END, ',', CASE WHEN pa.fem_max <> 0 THEN CAST(pa.fem_max AS CHAR) ELSE '' END, ',', CASE WHEN pa.gen_max <> 0 THEN CAST(pa.gen_max AS CHAR) ELSE '' END) , ',', CHAR(9)) "pogoMax" , pt.total "pogoTotal" FROM poke_agg pa JOIN pokedex pk ON pk.no = pa.base_no CROSS JOIN pogo_total pt LEFT JOIN f_pow fp ON fp.base_no = pa.base_no LEFT JOIN f_cnt fc ON fc.base_no = pa.base_no LEFT JOIN s_pow sp ON sp.base_no = pa.base_no LEFT JOIN s_cnt sc ON sc.base_no = pa.base_no LEFT JOIN t_pow tp ON tp.base_no = pa.base_no LEFT JOIN t_cnt tc ON tc.base_no = pa.base_no WHERE fp.base_no IS NOT NULL OR (pa.mal_max <> IFNULL(fc.mal_sum, 0) OR pa.fem_max <> IFNULL(fc.fem_sum, 0) OR pa.gen_max <> IFNULL(fc.gen_sum, 0)) OR sp.base_no IS NOT NULL OR (pa.mal_max <> IFNULL(sc.mal_sum, 0) OR pa.fem_max <> IFNULL(sc.fem_sum, 0) OR pa.gen_max <> IFNULL(sc.gen_sum, 0)) OR tp.base_no IS NOT NULL OR (pa.mal_max <> IFNULL(tc.mal_sum, 0) OR pa.fem_max <> IFNULL(tc.fem_sum, 0) OR pa.gen_max <> IFNULL(tc.gen_sum, 0)) ORDER BY pk.name
